pages.text:
في حديقةِ بيْـتِـهـا الـصَّـغِـيـرَهْ,
سَـارَةُ تـلـعَـبُ بِـاسْـتِـنَـارَهْ.
تُـرَاقِـبُ طُـيُـورًا بِـأَلْـوَانِ,
تَـتَـمَـنَّى تَـفْـهَـمُ الأَغَـانِـي.

صَـوْ��ٌ عَـالٍ قَـدْ جَـاءَ فَـجْـأَة,
مِـنْ شَـجَـرَةِ الـبَـلُّـوطِ بِـبَـهْـجَة.
سَـارَةُ تَـسْـمَـعُ هَـذَا الـصَّـوْتَ,
تَـسْـأَلُ: مَـا هَـذَا؟ يَـا لَـرَوْعَة!

تُـحَـاوِلُ سَـارَةُ تَـقْـلِـيـدَ,
أَصْـوَاتِ الـطُّـيُـورِ بِـتَـأْكِـيـدِ.
لَـكِـنَّـهَـا تَـفْـشَـلُ دَائِـمَـاً,
فَـهَـلْ تَـسْـتَـسْـلِـمُ يَا فَاهِمَاً؟

يَـظْـهَـرُ زَقْـزُوقُ الـصَّـغِـيـرُ,
عُـصْـفُـورٌ يَـطِـيـرُ وَيُـنِـيرُ.
يُـغَـنِّـي زَقْـزُوقُ لَـحْـنَـاً عَـذْبَاً,
فَـهَـلْ يُـسَـاعِـدُ سَـارَةَ قَـرِيـبَاً؟

سَـارَةُ تَـشْـعُـرُ بِـالإِحْـبَـاطِ,
فَـهْـيَ لَـمْ تَـفْـهَـمْ أَيَّْ أَنْـمَـاطِ.
تَـجْـلِـسُ وَحْـدَهَـا بِـحُـزْنٍ,
وَلَـكِـنْ لَـيْـسَ هَـذَا هُـوَ الـوِزْنُ.

زَقْـزُوقُ يُـدْرِكُ بِـالـفِـطْـنَةِ,
بِـأَنَّ سَـارَةَ بِـالأُذْنِ مُـهْـتَـمَّةِ.
عَـلَـيْـهَا أَنْ تَـسْـتَـمِـعَ بِـهُـدُوءِ,
لاَ أَنْ تُـقَـلِّـدَ بِـتَـشَـوُّهِ.

تُـغْـمِـضُ سَـارَةُ عَـيْـنَـيْـهَـا,
وَتُـرَكِّـزُ سَـمْـعَـهَـا إِلَـيْـهَـا.
تَـبْـدَأُ تَـفْـهَـمُ بَـعْـضَ الـنُّـطْقِ,
فَـهَـلْ نَـجَـحَـتْ فِي هَـذَا الْـوَقْتِ؟

سَـارَةُ تَـفْـهَـمُ مَـا يَـقُـولُ,
زَقْـزُوقُ يَـحْـكِـي بِـحُـلُـولِ.
تَـلْـعَـبُ مَـعَ الـطُّـيُـورِ سَـعِـيـدَةً,
وَتَـعِـيـشُ بِـحُـبٍّ رَغِـيـدَةً.

story_data.title: أصدقاء الغابة

prompts.imagePrompt:
**CHARACTER REFERENCES:**
- [IMAGE 1]: Match IMAGE 1 — face, hair, skin tone, clothing, art style.
- [IMAGE 2]: Match IMAGE 2 — face, age, outfit, art style.

**STYLE:**
undefined
Painterly brushwork, soft linework — consistent with IMAGE 1.
Flat 2D illustrated rendering. Stylized lighting only. No photographic shadows or lens effects.

**SCENE:**
- Setting: Panoramic Cover Scene
- Mood: Enchanting and hopeful
- Action: Sarah, wearing her butterfly backpack, is running towards a group of colorful birds that are taking flight from an old oak tree. She's reaching out her hand as if to join them in the air. The birds are scattering upwards, creating a dynamic sense of movement.

**COMPOSITION:**
- **FRONT COVER (LEFT):** Both characters occupy the left two-thirds of the frame, angled slightly inward toward each other.
- **BACK COVER (RIGHT):** Completely open and uncluttered background (e.g., clear sky or simple terrain) to leave space for the title logo.
- Framing: Wide panoramic shot. No dutch angles.

--no typography, watermarks, photorealistic lighting

structure.arcSummary: سارة تحلم بفهم لغة الحيوانات. تحاول تقليد الأصوات دون جدوى. بمساعدة عصفور صغير، تتعلم سارة الاستماع بإنصات وتفهم لغة الطيور.

characters.heroProfile: فضولية، تحب الاستكشاف، مرحة، تحلم بالحيوانات.

supportingRoles.name: عصفور زقزوق
supportingRoles.visualKey: عصفور صغير ذو ريش ملون وعينان واسعتان.
supportingRoles.functionType: مساعدة سارة على فهم لغة الطيور.

foundation.moral: الاستماع بإنصات يفتح لنا أبواب الفهم.
foundation.title: سارة والطيور المتكلمة
foundation.storyCore: سارة الصغيرة تحلم بفهم لغة الحيوانات وتخوض مغامرة لتحقيق ذلك.
foundation.heroDesire: أن تفهم سارة لغة الطيور والحيوانات.
foundation.mainChallenge: عدم قدرة سارة على فهم أصوات الحيوانات.
foundation.primaryVisualAnchor: حقيبة ظهر صغيرة على شكل فراشة

rawScript.text:
في حديقة بيتها، سارة تلعب،
 تراقب الطيور، هذا ما تحب.
سارة تحلم، تفهم الكلام،
 يا ليت الطيور ترد السلام.

صوت عالٍ جاء من بعيدِ،
 من شجرة البلوط، صوت جديدِ.
سارة تسمع، قلبها يسأل،
ما هذا الصوت؟ هل هو مُرسَل؟

تحاول سارة تقليد الأصواتِ،
 لكنها تفشل في كل الحالاتِ.
 يا ترى، ما الذي يجب أن تفعل؟
 لتحقيق حلمها، هل ستكمل؟

يظهر زقزوق، عصفور صغير,
يراقب سارة، هذا الأمير.
يغني زقزوق لحنًا جميلاً,
هل يساعد سارة فعلاً؟

سارة حزينة، لا تفهم شيئًا,
 تجلس وحدها، قلبها ضيقًا.
دمعة تسيل على خد سارة,
يا له من شعور بالمرارة!

زقزوق يشير برأسه الصغيرِ,
إلى سارة، يا له من تدبيرِ!
عليها أن تنصت، لا أن تقلد,
هذا ما يجب أن تفهم وتجتهد.

تغمض سارة عينيها الآن,
 وتركز سمعها بإمعان.
تبدأ تفهم بعض الكلماتِ,
يا لها من لحظة في الحياة!

سارة تفهم ما يقول زقزوق,
وتلعب مع الطيور بفرح وشوق.
الإنصات يفتح كل الأبواب,
وهكذا عاشت سارة بلا عذاب.

spreads.props: Butterfly backpack, colorful birds in flight, oak tree with detailed bark, lush green grass
spreads.keyActions: Sarah, wearing her butterfly backpack, is running towards a group of colorful birds that are taking flight from an old oak tree. She's reaching out her hand as if to join them in the air. The birds are scattering upwards, creating a dynamic sense of movement.
spreads.colorPalette: Vibrant, warm colors with a golden hue, reminiscent of a magical sunrise.
spreads.continuityNotes: Title to be placed on the Left side of the scene, using the open sky as negative space.

spreads.props: Colorful flowers, various species of birds, butterfly backpack, lush green grass
spreads.keyActions: Sarah sits on the grass in her garden, attentively watching several colorful birds perched on nearby flowers and branches. The birds are chirping and fluttering around. Sarah's butterfly backpack rests beside her.
spreads.colorPalette: Bright and cheerful, dominated by greens, blues, yellows, and reds of the flowers and birds.
spreads.continuityNotes: Ensure the garden layout remains consistent.

spreads.props: Large oak tree with detailed bark, a single bird perched high up, falling leaves, butterfly backpack at the base of the tree.
spreads.lighting: Sunlight filtering through the oak leaves
spreads.keyActions: Sarah looks up towards the large oak tree, her face showing curiosity and surprise. A single bird is perched on a high branch of the oak tree, emitting a loud, distinct call. The leaves of the oak tree are partially obscuring the sun.
spreads.colorPalette: Earthy tones of the oak tree contrast with the bright sky.

spreads.props: Oak tree in the background, various birds, butterfly backpack.
spreads.keyActions: Sarah is making different bird sounds, her face scrunched in concentration. Several birds are looking at her with a mixture of amusement and confusion. The butterfly backpack is beside her.
spreads.colorPalette: Muted greens and browns, reflecting Sarah's struggle.

spreads.props: Oak tree, Zaqzooq the bird, butterfly backpack.
spreads.keyActions: Zaqzooq, a small, bright bird, is perched on a branch of the oak tree, singing a cheerful song. Sarah is looking up at Zaqzooq with a hopeful expression. The butterfly backpack is visible on the ground, near the base of the tree.
spreads.colorPalette: Vibrant colors emphasizing Zaqzooq's bright plumage.
spreads.continuityNotes: Zaqzooq is distinctly smaller and brighter than other birds.

spreads.props: Tree stump, wilted flowers, butterfly backpack.
spreads.keyActions: Sarah sits alone on a tree stump in the garden, her head down and shoulders slumped. Her butterfly backpack is next to her. The surrounding flowers and plants appear slightly wilted.
spreads.colorPalette: Muted and desaturated colors, reflecting Sarah's sadness.

spreads.keyActions: Zaqzooq perches on the edge of the tree stump near Sarah, tilting his head and looking at her with understanding. Zaqzooq subtly gestures with his head, indicating that Sarah should listen carefully. The butterfly backpack is still next to Sarah.
spreads.colorPalette: Warm, comforting colors as Zaqzooq provides guidance.
spreads.continuityNotes: Focus on Zaqzooq's subtle head gesture.

spreads.keyActions: Sarah closes her eyes and focuses on listening to Zaqzooq's song. Zaqzooq is perched on a branch near her, singing softly. Her butterfly backpack is on the ground next to her.
spreads.colorPalette: Soft, muted colors with a hint of purple in the sky.
spreads.continuityNotes: Emphasize Sarah's closed eyes and focused expression.

spreads.keyActions: Sarah plays happily with Zaqzooq and other birds in her garden, understanding their songs. They are flying around her, interacting with her, and she is giggling. Her butterfly backpack is on her back.
spreads.colorPalette: Warm, vibrant colors in the twilight, conveying happiness and harmony.
spreads.continuityNotes: Show Sarah interacting with the birds in a friendly way.

characters.heroProfile: فضولية، تحب الاستكشاف، مرحة، تحلم بالحيوانات.

supportingRoles.name: عصفور زقزوق
supportingRoles.visualKey: عصفور صغير ذو ريش ملون وعينان واسعتان.
supportingRoles.functionType: مساعدة سارة على فهم لغة الطيور.

visualAnchors.signatureItems: Small backpack shaped like a butterfly
visualAnchors.persistentProps: Birds of various colors, Oak Tree, Garden Flowers
visualAnchors.recurringLocations: Sarah's garden, Under the Oak Tree

story_data.selectedStylePrompt: A beautiful, nostalgic illustration style inspired by classic Japanese animation (Ghibli). Features lush, painterly watercolor backgrounds, especially of nature and skies.
